---
title: 'Attendance of Underserved Populations at Field-Based Health Services Events: Application of Quasi-Experimental Methods that Accommodate the COVID-19 Pandemic'
date: '2025-01-01'
author: [Leslie D Leve, David S DeGarmo, Jake Searcy, Elizabeth L Budd, Jorge I Ramı́rez Garc\á, Anne Marie Mauricio, William A Cresko]
publication: Prevention Science, _1-11_ (2025).
categories: [health,justice]
url_source: 'https://link.springer.com/10.1007/s11121-025-01769-z'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Prevention Science
issue: null
page: "1-11"
year: 2025
image: ''
pub_number: 15
---
